channel.title: Vienna Public Transport — Disruptions & Commuter Info
channel.description: Active disruptions, construction works and restrictions from official sources (Wiener Linien, ÖBB, VOR/VAO, City of Vienna).

item.title: 11: Schadhafter Zug Betrieb ab Zentralfriedhof 3. Tor
71: Schadhafter Zug Betrieb ab Zentralfriedhof 3. Tor
Wien Blumental ↔ Wien Meidling
item.description: Due to damage to the track between Wien Blumental Bahnhst and Wien Meidling Bahnhof (U) Train journeys to expected 10:00 o'clock are limited. [Since 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Due to damage to the track between Wien Blumental Bahnhst and Wien Meidling Bahnhof (U) Train journeys to expected 10:00 o'clock are limited.
[Since 30.06.2026]

item.title: 98A: construction works
item.description: The line 98A is redirected in both directions between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Jägermaiszufahrt via Biberhaufenweg - Plattensteinergasse - Lobaugasse. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
The line 98A is redirected in both directions between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Jägermaiszufahrt via Biberhaufenweg - Plattensteinergasse - Lobaugasse.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 57A: roadworks
item.description: Because of roadworks in the Gumpendorfer Straße between Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz and Laimgrubengasse, the line 57A operating short-running becomes the line Laimgrubengasse. [07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of roadworks in the Gumpendorfer Straße between Fritz-Grünbaum-Platz and Laimgrubengasse, the line 57A operating short-running becomes the line Laimgrubengasse.
[07.07.2026 – 16.08.2027]

item.title: 10A: delays
item.description: irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle. [On 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
irregular intervals in both directions. Reason: defective vehicle.
[On 30.06.2026]

item.title: 66A/N66: Grenzackerstraße
item.description: Stop change of lines 66A and N66 towards Liesing S Stop: Grenzackerstraße From: Laxenburger Straße 104 to Raxstraße To: about 30 Meter towards … [13.07.2026 – 13.07.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Stop change of lines 66A and N66 towards Liesing S Stop: Grenzackerstraße From: Laxenburger Straße 104 to Raxstraße To: about 30 Meter towards …
[13.07.2026 – 13.07.2027]

item.title: 76B/79A/79B: roadworks
item.description: Because of construction works in the Margentinstraße, the lines 76B, 79A and 79B are being redirected. [07.07.2026 – 01.09.2027]
item.content:encoded:
Because of construction works in the Margentinstraße, the lines 76B, 79A and 79B are being redirected.
[07.07.2026 – 01.09.2027]

item.title: 25: Heat-related damage to the line
item.description: Operation only between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Josef-Baumann-Gasse. [28.06.2026 – 04.07.2026]
item.content:encoded:
Operation only between Aspern, Oberdorfstraße and Josef-Baumann-Gasse.
[28.06.2026 – 04.07.2026]

item.title: 25: track damage Einstieg on line 26 (stop direction Floridsdorf )
item.description: track damage Einstieg on line 26 (stop direction Floridsdorf <>) [29.06.2026 – 30.06.2026]
item.content:encoded:
track damage Einstieg on line 26 (stop direction Floridsdorf <>)
[29.06.2026 – 30.06.2026]
